top_signals.title: Hegseth warns NATO allies that some nations will 'fail' U.S. defense review
top_signals.summary: The U.S. defense secretary also said it was "shameful" that European allies refused to give U.S. forces access to bases to strike Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Polymarket Insider Trading Fears Grow
top_signals.summary: Polymarket is putting insider trading fears in plain sight. Bloomberg's Denitsa Tsekova joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain how prediction markets have opened a new frontier for betting on geopolitics, from Iran strikes to peace deals, while transparent wallet activity makes suspicious trades easier to track than in traditional markets. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: What brings Modi and Netanyahu together
top_signals.summary: As Israel’s isolation deepens, ties with New Delhi are growing — from drones to statues
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The DAO hack at 10: From $50 million exploit to a $130 million Ethereum security fund
top_signals.summary: Ten years ago, an attacker drained roughly 3.6 million ETH from The DAO, helping to spur the creation of the modern crypto security industry.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Google Gemini co-lead Noam Shazeer leaves for OpenAI
top_signals.summary: Google's vice president of engineering and a co-leader of its Gemini AI models announced Wednesday he is leaving the company to join OpenAI.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Knicks Championship Parade Takes Over NYC
top_signals.summary: A ticker-tape parade celebrating the Knicks' NBA Championship kicked off Thursday morning in New York City in the "Canyon of Heroes." Millions of fans are on hand. Mayor Zohran Mamdani will present the team with keys to the city at City Hall. Bloomberg Senior Reporter Randall Williams joined Bloomberg Open Interest from the festivities in lower Manhattan with the latest on the celebration. (Source: Bloomberg)
